title: Measuring Sales Cycle Length
excerpt: Hi - Is anyone aware of how to measure sales cycle length based maybe based on item creation date and deal close date?  Thanks

posts.author: brianwbates (Brian Bates)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - Is anyone aware of how to measure sales cycle length based maybe based on item creation date and deal close date? Thanks

posts.author: PegaChris (Chris Maertz)
posts.cookedHtml:
brianwbates:

how to measure sales cycle length based maybe based on item creation date and deal close date? Thanks

As long as you have 2 date columns, you can use a Formula column to calculate the days between the two dates.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @brianwbates, like @PegaChris mentioned, the way to go is probably to use the formula column, and in particular the DAYS or WORKDAYS function:

  • The Formula Column

  • List of all available formulas (this article has helpful examples)

Let us know if you have any questions after you give it a go!
